programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Reaching for the Stars: To apologize for breaking his telescope, Monkey goes looking for a star for Papa Smurf. (S3, ep 8a)

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf accidentally gives Baby Smurf a growth potion in 'Big Baby', then in 'Don't Smurf a Sound', Gargamel gives Azrael supersonic ears and suddenly, the Smurfs can't make a noise. (S4, ep 7)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: Brittany takes up painting to impress her fashion idol in 'Art For Art's Sake', and then in 'Mancave', Alvin, convinced that Julie and her son are trying to move in, tries to stop it. (S1, ep 25)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: The boys build a treehouse in the backyard and move out in 'Independence Day', and in 'Opposites Attract', an invention of Simon's accidently magnetizes Alvin and Simon to each other. (S3, ep 11)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: The chipmunks think Dave is in danger in 'The Exchange Student', then in 'Crystal Ball Birthday', Annie and Amber plan Brittany's birthday party, pitting her against Jeanette and Eleanor. (S4, ep 12)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: Theodore mistakenly thinks he's the oldest brother in 'Big Bro Theodore', and in 'No Putts, No Glory', Alvin fools Theodore into believing he's good at mini golf which of course backfires. (S4, ep 10)

programme.title: Rock, Paper, Scissors
programme.desc: Paper vows to get a holiday of his own in 'National Paper Day', and in 'Helping With The Groceries', Scissors goes deep into his mind to decide on whether to help bring in the groceries. (S1, ep 18)

programme.title: Rock, Paper, Scissors
programme.desc: Scissors sells his likeness to a company that sells nappies for babies with huge poops in 'Diapers', and then in 'R.O.V.E.R.', Rock tries pet ownership, taking care of a deadly robot dog. (S1, ep 19)

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Cat Cop: When baby families are leaving town, Boss Baby and Tim battle to prove Bootsy is behind it all. (S1, ep 11)

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Hang in There, Baby: When Mega Fat CEO Baby claims he has dirt that could get Boss Baby fired, Boss Baby and the team try to find a way to get it first! (S1, ep 12)

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Six Well-Placed Kittens: When Bootsy's plan of 6 strategically placed kittens brings the whole town down, Mega Fat is forced to team with Boss Baby. (S1, ep 13)

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: As the Diaper Changes: When Grandma Templeton comes to stay, Boss Baby and Tim struggle to be roommates. Meanwhile, Baby Corp's new CEO trusts Boss Baby with the new Stinkless Serum. (S1, ep 14)

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Super Cool Big Kids Inc.: Convinced old people are the new enemy, Boss Baby uses Tim to create havoc at the senior center, but a war soon begins when the seniors rally against babies. (S1, ep 15)

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: P.U.: Boss Baby must "de-stink" Simmons after a misfire of Stinkless Serum, and Tim & Danny try to upgrade their smallscale taxi business. (S1, ep 16)

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Hush, Little Baby: When Frederic Estes tries to get babies banned from the local library, the babies fight back in a war for story time. (S1, ep 17)

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Night of the Frodarg: On a dark and stormy night, Tim's fears of a local legend and Boss Baby's fear of a PuppyCo agent make the brothers to unite to stay safe as the house is infiltrated. (S1, ep 18)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: The Chipmunks and Chipettes play in a dodgeball tournament in 'Munk Vs Machine', then in 'Shack Magic', The Chipmunks find a shack that magically fills with toys and games, but is it magic? (S4, ep 9)

programme.title: Max & the Midknights
programme.desc: A Restless Knight - Part One: After a raucous season one, Max & the Midknights are back and ready for action! There's just one problem - Byjovia is quiet. Too quiet! (S3, ep 1)

programme.title: Max & the Midknights
programme.desc: A Restless Knight - Part Two: When the Gnomes of Tresk are kidnapped by a strange evil, the Midknights volunteer to save them, but Max learns not all the Midknights are as eager as she is. (S3, ep 2)

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Halmoni becomes a master hacker in 'Halmoni Learns the Internet', then in 'The Library', Lily must retrieve a book from a horrifying maze of unknown terrors. (S2, ep 11)

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Will and Min have a disastrous date in 'Date Night', then in 'Behind the Jingle', the family writes a chart-topping jingle. (S2, ep 12)

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Picture Perfect: Tim and Boss Baby want to bond with Dad by recreating a perfect "Dudes Weekend' camping trip, culminating in a photo opp, but everything seems to go wrong. (S1, ep 23)

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Play It Again, Tim: When Tim is forced to take piano lessons, he actually enjoys them and Boss Baby realizes Tim is being brainwashed by his teacher, slowly turning Tim into an old man. (S1, ep 24)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin accuses Dave of yelling at him too much in 'Alvin Management', then in 'Time Capsule', the school digs up an old high school time capsule, and Miss Smith and Dave keep an old secret. (S4, ep 8)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin talks Dave into a poor scheme in 'Tour Bus', then in 'Game Show', Alvin signs the Chipmunks up for a game show that forces losing contestants to perform dangerous stunts. (S4, ep 7)

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: A traffic jam turns into anarchy in Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette', then in 'How to Bag a Beast', Jack and Lily try to catch a legendary fish. (S2, ep 1)

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Jack gets his first phone and mistakes are immediately made in 'Wrong Text', then in 'Emergency Family Tribunal', when the last hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni. (S2, ep 2)

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Captain Man Goes on Vacation: Ray has trusted Henry and Charlotte with protecting Swellview while he's out of town at his cousin's wedding. (S2, ep 5)

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: The Time Jerker: When Kid Danger and Captain Man battle the Time Bandit, Kid Danger accidentally falls into the Time Bandit's time machine and relives the same day over again. (S2, ep 6)

programme.title: Erin and Aaron
programme.desc: Bad Romance: Erin and Aaron both have love problems, so they decide to help each other with their crushes. (S1, ep 10)

programme.title: Erin and Aaron
programme.desc: Pictures of You: Natasha plans the family moving announcement photoshoot, and Erin and Aaron team up to sabotage it. (S1, ep 11)

programme.title: Drama Club
programme.desc: Stress Rehearsal: As the club prepares for the final dress rehearsal, Mack's stress builds higher as they have trouble getting through it. Bench drops some big news on the club. (S1, ep 9)

programme.title: Drama Club
programme.desc: The Show Might Go On: The drama club's performance of Minnesota: The Musical is finally ready to hit the stage, but just about everything that can go wrong, does. (S1, ep 10)

programme.title: The Thundermans
programme.desc: Robin Hood - Prince of Pheebs: When Chloe announces that Max is her favourite, Phoebe tells a bedtime story about the great Phoebe Hood and the evil Maxingham. (S3, ep 25)

programme.title: The Thundermans
programme.desc: Aunt Misbehavin': Max & Phoebe give their mom the ultimate birthday surprise by tracking down her long lost sister, but then they discover that they've been feuding for years. (S3, ep 19)

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Mo' Danger, Mo' Problems: As Henry tries to adjust to his new role as Kid Danger, he struggles to balance his schedule between crime fighting, school, family and friends. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The Boss Babysitter: Mom and Dad Templeton do the unthinkable: leave Boss Baby and Tim under the authority of a babysitter! (S1, ep 7)

programme.title: Sonic Prime

programme.title: The Thundermans
programme.desc: Beat the Parents: Nervous about meeting his girlfriend's parents, Max enlists help from Phoebe, whose charms backfire and leave Max banned from ever seeing his girlfriend again. (S3, ep 26)

programme.title: The Thundermans
programme.desc: Can't Spy Me Love: After seeing a cute guy but missing her chance to meet him, Phoebe accesses the Hero League's villain search software to track him down. (S3, ep 22)

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Text, Lies, & Video: When a video of Henry and Ray transforming into Kid Danger and Captain Man gets out, Henry must get it back so that his secret identity isn't revealed. (S2, ep 12)

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Opposite Universe: Henry and Charlotte are transported into an opposite universe where Ray and Schwoz are evil and want to destroy Piper. They must figure out how to get back. (S2, ep 13)

programme.title: City Adventures
programme.desc: The Trojan Slooshie: The Ice Cream Truck Bandits waylay the police force with frozen drinks, giving the officers Glacial Brain Freeze. (S4, ep 3b)

programme.title: City Adventures
programme.desc: Born To Direct: Maddy's filmmaking ambitions go wild when she offers to direct a simple fire safety video. (S4, ep 4a)

programme.title: City Adventures
programme.desc: The Wexler Deflection Conjecture: Depressed, Dr. Wexler quits science. But when a meteor threatens the city, Billy and Maddy must convince him to return, and save them all! (S4, ep 4b)

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Meteorite finds a night club in the forest in 'Disco Smurf', then in 'Dwayne's New Toy', Diaper Daddy is looking for a more loving family after being betrayed by Handy. (S4, ep 4)

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Tree of Knowledge: The Smurfs unwittingly ask Dimwitty for advice when he gets stuck in a hollowed out tree, thinking they've found the Tree of Knowledge. (S3, ep 7b)

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Dwayne is turned into a tracker dog to help his uncle to catch the Smurfs in 'Gargamel's Doggy', then in 'Drummer Girl', Gargamel bewitches Meteorite's drum and hypnotizes the Smurfies. (S4, ep 5)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks

programme.desc: Art House Day: Granny Sheep and Suzy take Granny Pig and Peppa around Art House Day. After a day full of screen printing and silhouette miniatures, Granny Pig finds the perfect artwork. (S7, ep 19)

programme.desc: Wildflower Wood: Madame Gazelle and Mr Bull lead the children to the wildflower wood to learn all about flowers. The children enjoy identifying Wild Garlic, Bluebells and even an orchid! (S7, ep 20)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Sunny Day Games: Peppa and George are playing at their grandparent's garden on a very hot day but they don't have a paddling pool! (S7, ep 21)

programme.desc: Pups Save the Fizzy Pickles: Mr. Porter is delivering his famous fizzy pickles to people around town when a bumpy road shakes up the deliveries and causes the pickle jars to pop! [SL]

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa's Diary: Peppa learns that Mummy Pig used to keep a diary when she was her age, so Peppa decides to give it a try.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Roman Day: Peppa and George dress up as Romans, make a pebble mosaic and even learn a little Latin.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig's Metal Detector: Grandpa can't find his old metal detector to look for the key for George's new toy robot lost in the long grass.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Recorders: Madame Gazelle teaches the playgroup to play the recorder. After lots of practice at home, they put on a concert for their parents.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Time Out: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas. (S1, ep 35)

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Lucy's School: Holly and Ben spend a day at Lucy's school, whilst trying not to be spotted by Lucy's teacher, Miss Cookie.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grampy Rabbit in Space: Grampy Rabbit visits Peppa's playgroup to talk about space rockets.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Sandpit: Peppa and her friends are building a desert island, in the sandpit. They add a forest, a lake, houses, and shops. It's all going very well until George and Richard's dinosaurs turn up!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Castle: Mummy and Daddy Pig take Peppa and George to a castle to feast on medieval banquets, play King and Queen and even meet a dragon. It's George's favourite day ever!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Spider Web: Mummy Pig finds a spider in the house and orders Daddy Pig to get rid of it. Mr Skinny-Legs is set free in the garden, where he can spin all the webs he likes, wherever he likes.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Pups Find a Hidden Jungle: Tracker stumbles into a jungle, with its animal inhabitants who are frightened by the rumblings of an impending volcano. It's up to Ryder and the pups to help. (S10, ep 3)

programme.desc: Explorer: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. (S1, ep 31)

programme.desc: Mole: Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole. (S1, ep 30)

programme.desc: Recorders: Madame Gazelle teaches the playgroup to play the recorder. After lots of practice at home, they put on a concert for their parents.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Parking Ticket: When Daddy Pig gets a parking ticket, Peppa and George learn that grown-ups have rules just like children - and get told off too!

programme.desc: Blossom helps a lost bee in 'Bee my Friend', then in 'Papa's Birthday Gift', apa Smurf doesn't like Begonia's present so he smurfs it, but doesn't dare admit it ... (S4, ep 13)

programme.desc: Farmer hires Yippy, Willow's plant, to watch over his crops in 'Farmer's New Pet', and then in 'Spider Smurf, Papa Smurf makes a revitalizing potion that turns him into a spider! (S4, ep 8)

programme.desc: Pups Save Lizzy's Lemonade Blaze:Mayor Humdinger and his kitties accidentally set Lizzy's Lemonade Stand and parts of Foggy Bottom ablaze. It's up to the pups to extinguish the fires! (S11, ep 21)

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Pups Save Adventure Bay: Adventure Bay is hosting a Monster Truck Rally, featuring Roxi and Boomer. However, when Boomer isn't declared the Champion, he causes chaos all over town. (S10, ep 23)

programme.desc: Potty Training: Peppa, Suzy Sheep, Mummy and Daddy help George understand what a potty is and how to avoid accidents. George gains confidence.

programme.desc: Grampy Rabbit in Space: Grampy Rabbit visits Peppa's playgroup to talk about space rockets.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.desc: The Queen: Miss Rabbit is to be given the Queen's award for Industry for all the hard work she does. Peppa and her friends accompany Miss Rabbit to the Palace to meet the Queen!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig's Birthday: Today is Daddy Pig's birthday. But Daddy Pig still has to go to work! While Daddy is out, Mummy Pig, Peppa and George prepare a "special birthday surprise".

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: School Camp: Peppa and her friends are going camping. Madame Gazelle, their teacher, is in charge. First they put up their tents. Then they collect sticks to make a campfire.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Rebecca Rabbit: Peppa and George visit Rebecca Rabbit's house today. Rebecca's house is a bit different to Peppa's house - it is inside a hill! And instead of stairs and corridors, there are tunnels!

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Lucy's Sleepover: Holly shrinks Lucy and her dog, Rex, down so they can play in the Little Kingdom.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Trip To The Seaside: Holly joins Ben and his family on a trip to the seaside, and Mr Elf tells her that no magic is to be used. But when no one has remembered to pack lunch, they ask Holly to help.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Uncle Gaston: Three baby ladybirds, Amber, Emerald and Keith have come to stay at Uncle Gaston's for the day. The baby ladybirds are exhausting! So Ben and Holly help Gaston to keep them entertained.

programme.desc: Springtime: Springtime in the Little Kingdom brings out tulips, daffodils, hedgehogs... and two very hungry gnomes.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Eye Test: Peppa goes to the opticians for an eye test and tries out spectacles of all different shapes and colours.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Blackberry Bush: Peppa and her family collect apples and blackberries in Granny and Grandpa Pig's garden to make a pie.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Digging Up The Road: Peppa and her family are trying to get to the playground, but Mr Bull and his team are digging up the road.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mandy Mouse's Birthday: Today is Mandy Mouse's birthday, and as a special treat, Mandy is going to Cheese World with her friends. It is the most fun ever!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Fancy Dress Party: Peppa and George are having a fancy dress party, Peppa is dressed as a fairy princess and George is dressed as a scary dinosaur!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Playing Golf: George and Peppa spend the day playing golf with Grandpa Pig, but they are much more interested in the colourful minigolf course next door.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A Day With Doctor Hamster: Peppa and Suzy Sheep are spending a day helping Dr Hamster the Vet. They meet so many pets and have such fun.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Books: Queen Thistle reads the children a story, which inspires a question. They can't find the answer in the magic books in the castle, so go instead to the Wise Old Elf in the Great Elf Library.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Cows: The children are at the Elf Farm, but to learn where milk comes from they must visit a big farm, to find cows. They travel to Lucy Big's farm, where she shows them all the animals.

programme.desc: Double Booked: Tim tries to be at two parties at once. (S1, ep 25)

programme.desc: Something is making strange noises in 'Paddington's Mysterious Cave Discovery', and in 'Paddington and the Fossil Hunt', Judy wants to find a fossil on the beach, but isn't having any luck. (S3, ep 8)

programme.desc: Being Inspired: Granny Sheep is driving Vanessa, the art van along the road with Peppa, Suzy, Pedro, Mandy, Molly and Danny. They are taking her to the boat yard, for her first-ever outing! (S8, ep 9)

programme.desc: Patchwork Quilt: Mummy Pig and Peppa are at Granny Pig's house. They find Mummy's old patchwork quilt that Granny made for her as a baby. Peppa decides she'd like to make one for the baby! (S8, ep 7)

programme.desc: New Car: Mr Zebra arrives with a new car seat for the baby! Excited to try it in the car, the family soon realise it won't fit with Peppa and George too. It's time for a new car! (S8, ep 4)

programme.desc: Staying Up Late: Auntie, Uncle Pig and cousin Chloe are coming for dinner and Peppa is allowed to join too! Peppa is very proud of staying up late - she even stayed up later than the Daddies!

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Electric Car: Peppa's family squeeze into the new car that Daddy Pig is trying out for fun. (S5, ep 39)

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.desc: Nanny Plum's Lesson: Nanny Plum is teaching the fairy girls some important fairy rules when she is blown away, trapped in a tree, dropped in a stream and covered in mud!

programme.desc: Mr. Bull The Teacher: Madame Gazelle leaves the class with Mr Bull while she goes to the dentist. But the children already know the subjects Mr Bull suggests teaching!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Please and Thank You: Peppa and George learn some wonderful magic words. Nice things happen when you say please and thank you!

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Windmills: Peppa and her friends are at playgroup when Mr. Bull arrives to do some noisy work - he is building a windmill, to make electricity! The children join in and make their own windmills too.

programme.desc: Moon Cow: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. (S1, ep 16)

programme.desc: Books: Queen Thistle reads the children a story, which inspires a question. They can't find the answer in the magic books in the castle, so go instead to the Wise Old Elf in the Great Elf Library.

programme.desc: The Ant Farm: Things are going missing all over the Little Kingdom - Holly has lost her wand and Ben has lost his horn! Soon they realise that ants are stealing their things.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Redbeard The Elf Pirate: Barnaby Elf's uncle, Redbeard the Elf Pirate, comes to visit the Little Kingdom, but he has lost his treasure. Everyone must help Redbeard track down the treasure.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Tadpoles: Holly takes some frogspawn home from class to look after, but is surprised when the frogspawn turns into tadpoles overnight. Soon there are lots of little frogs for Holly to look after!

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Cows: The children are at the Elf Farm, but to learn where milk comes from they must visit a big farm, to find cows. They travel to Lucy Big's farm, where she shows them all the animals.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Paddington and Robot Paddingtron enjoy being heroes in 'Paddington and Paddingtron's Heroic Day', then in 'Paddington's Heroic Non-Stop Adventure', Paddington discovers how to be calm. (S3, ep 16)

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kico the Kittycorn: Every time a rainbow appears, a Kittycorn family gets their special baby Kittycorn! So when Gabby unboxes a baby Kittycorn, all the Gabby Cats help her take care of it. (S3, ep 6)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grampy Rabbit's Hovercraft: Grampy Rabbit saves the day when Grandpa Pig's boat sinks and drives everyone around on his Hovercraft!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Playgroup Star: Peppa gets her very first Playgroup Star in school for drawing a wonderful picture of her house!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Carnival: The Carnival has come to town and it's a chance to see all sorts of exciting people and floats!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mr. Bull's New Road: Peppa takes Goldie the Goldfish for a visit to the vets and is surprised when she finds that there's a new road to be built over the building!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Caves: The family has all gone to the caves for a day out and Grampy Rabbit is their tour guide!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa's Toy Plane: Grandpa Pig shares with Peppa and George his love of building toy planes and there is one extra special plane that Granny Pig has yet to see.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George's New Clothes: George, Peppa and Mummy Pig head off to Miss Rabbit's clothes shop to get George some brand new clothes.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle's House: Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy Pig have gone to visit Madame Gazelle and her wonky house!

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tailball: Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball. (S1, ep 15)

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Babysitting: Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit. (S1, ep 21)

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Treasure: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. (S1, ep 22)

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You
programme.desc: Rainbow Puppy's Skidoo Adventure!: Josh and Blue are having a playdate with our friend Rainbow Puppy, who makes everything extra exciting! We play a special game of Rainbow Puppy's Clues! (S3, ep 18)

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Queen Thistle's Day Off: Queen Thistle decides to take a day off, so Holly, Ben, Nanny and the King have to look after the naughty twins Daisy and Poppy for the day.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Nature Class: Nanny Plum takes the Fairy children for a nature class in the woods, and bumps into the Wise Old Elf who is teaching a nature class to the Elf children.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Toy Robot: Out playing in the meadow, Holly, Ben and their friends find a broken toy robot. Holly fixes it with magic, but the robot does not behave as they thought it would!

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Big Bad Barry: King Thistle wants fish for dinner, so he goes out fishing with Mr Elf, Ben and Holly on Mr Elf's boat. Mr Elf tells them a story about the biggest, baddest fish ever - Big Bad Barry.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Long Train Journey: Daddy Pig receives a letter saying he must go away on business to test some very important concrete!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Suzy Goes Away: Mummy Sheep gets the news that she has got a new job far away, leaving Suzy and Peppa to wonder how they're going to carry on being best friends!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Tiny Land: It's time for a day out and Peppa, George, Mummy Pig, Daddy Pig and Suzy Sheep all go to visit Tiny Land.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Work and Play: Peppa and Suzy learn that grown-ups must work all day, and the children play at working in a shop at playgroup and find it very hard work.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Rainbow: Peppa and her family spot a rainbow when they go for a drive.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Pedro's Cough: Pedro gets a cough at playschool and the other children quickly catch it. Doctor Brownbear is called and gives them horrible medicine, but who will look after him when he is ill?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Library: Daddy Pig has a book from the library that he has kept for too long. The family go to the library to return it and find more books to read.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Camper Van: Peppa and her family go on holiday in a special van, and Peppa is surprised to find that at a push of a button the van turns into a little house for them to sleep in.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Paddington seeks the mystery hero doing good deeds in Windsor Gardens in 'Paddington and the Unlikely Hero', then in 'Paddington Needs a Hero', Paddington gets stuck in an igloo! (S3, ep 17)

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Danny X straps on a rocket booster in 'Pups Stop A Rocket-Powered Pogo Stick', then in 'Pups Save the Sky-High Stunt Show', Francois' stunt goes horribly awry. (S11, ep 10)

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Humdinger builds a mechanical rain cloud in 'Pups vs the Hum-Cloud', then in 'Pups Stop the Mid-Air Magnet', Otis gets a powerful magnetic drone. (S11, ep 11)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Camping Holiday: Peppa and her family are on holiday. They decide to go to Duck Land, a special park where they can see the ducks in the river, and are surprised when their van turns into a boat.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa's Compost Heap: Peppa and George take a bin of vegetable peelings to Grandpa Pig's compost heap. Granny and Grandpa use the compost to help their plants grow.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Richard Rabbit Comes To Play: Richard Rabbit comes to play with George, while Suzy Sheep comes to play with Peppa. The little boys don't want to play the same games as Peppa and Suzy.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Fun Run: Daddy Pig struggled to run a race to raise money to fix the school roof, but finds it far easier when a wasp is chasing him.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Washing: Daddy Pig hangs his clean football shirt out to dry, but Peppa, George and Mummy splash it with mud. They put it in the wash, but Peppa puts her red dress in, which makes Daddy's shirt pink!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Polly's Boat Trip: Peppa and George go on a boat trip with Grandpa Pig, but they must send for help when their boat runs aground. Polly Parrot fetches Granny Pig and Granddad Dog, who rescues them.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Delphine Donkey: Peppa's French friend Delphine Donkey comes to stay. Peppa takes Delphine to playgroup where they teach her the 'Bing Bong Song'.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Fire Engine: Peppa and George go with Mummy Pig to Miss Rabbit's Mummies Fire Engine Service.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Super Skateboard: It's Grammy's birthday and Crusher wants to get her a super special gift. Blaze and AJ go with him on an adventure doing different jobs to earn the money in time. (S7, ep 3)

programme.title: DORA
programme.desc: Dora gets a birthday surprise in 'Dora's Birthday Surprise', then in 'Moonlight Fiesta', Dora helps La Luna save the Moonlight Fiesta. (S3, ep 5)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Adventure Caravan: Peppa and her family are on a caravan adventure and the first stop is The Biggest Potato in the World. When it starts to get foggy, they park up before another busy day. (S7, ep 25)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Caravan Friends: After Peppa and family visit a tourist spot with her new friend Birgit Bear, the caravan unhooks from the car! Luckily, the bear family stop it just in time. (S7, ep 26)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Chloe's Birthday Party: At Chloe's party, the children and grownups struggle to finish the obstacle course to reach the prize. George is the last to try and finds the birthday cake! (S7, ep 27)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Broken Party Bus: Miss Rabbit arrives with the broken bus. This is a job for Grampy Rabbit! Once fixed, Mummy Rabbit and Rebecca Rabbit arrive with a cake for Grampy Rabbit's birthday! (S7, ep 28)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Living Above the Shops: Peppa is playing with Freddy Fox at his home, in an apartment above the shops. Peggi and Pandora Panda, and Candy Cat live there too, and help show Peppa around. (S7, ep 30)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Roof Top Garden: Peppa and family come to help make a garden on the roof of the apartments. Mr Bull assists with a big truck and crane. There is even a little something for Mrs Duck! (S7, ep 31)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Moving In: Peppa is playing with Candy Cat when Emily Elephant's Granny moves out of the apartment. When the new neighbours arrive, Peppa recognises her holiday friend Rohan Rhino. (S7, ep 32)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Everybody Sleepover!: Peppa and all her friends are having a sleepover - different friends in each of the apartments in the high street. So they play hide and seek across all the rooms! (S7, ep 33)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Walking Bus: The children must walk to school in a walking bus! Miss Rabbit wears a high visibility jacket, leading Peppa and friends in a bus formation. (S7, ep 34)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Happily Ever After: At the playgroup, Madame Gazelle is reading a story, but a page is missing so she makes up an ending. During playtime, the children make up their own endings too! (S7, ep 35)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Singing Lesson: Madame Gazelle is giving the playgroup a singing lesson, helped by Mummy Rhino on the piano. When the parents arrive, the children perform their song. (S7, ep 36)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Singing Competition: Today is the grown-ups' singing competition at the theatre and the kids are the judges. The children jump up and down and sing along. Everybody loves singing! (S7, ep 37)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Larenzo Lion: Today, Mummy Pig and Peppa are at the zoo and meet Larenzo Lion who lives there! Larenzo shows Peppa his toy zoo, but he keeps misplacing his wooden animals in his two bedrooms!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Dinosaurs Alive!: The playgroup is visiting the zoo today. Mr Lion then shows them a giant lizard! The children all believe it's a dinosaur.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Being Babies: Peppa and Rebecca Rabbit pretend to be babies to get Mummy Rabbit's attention. Mummy Rabbit plays along until they admit they are not really babies!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mr Cat's Cafe: Peppa is on a play date with Candy Cat at Mr Cat's Cafe. Candy show Mr Cat the drawings they've done of everyone, and he hangs them up for everyone to see.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Cushion Den: On a cold day, Daddy Pig suggests they build a den until Mummy Pig has finished work. After a hard day's work, the cushion den is a perfect place to watch TV together!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Staying Up Late: Auntie, Uncle Pig and cousin Chloe are coming for dinner and Peppa is allowed to join too! Peppa is very proud of staying up late - she even stayed up later than the Daddies!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: New TV: Peppa and family are watching TV... until it breaks! While Grampy Rabbit fixes it, the family get a new TV which can do everything... but it doesn't beat their old TV.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Indoor Adventure: A storm cancels Peppa and her family's adventure plans so they decide to take it inside. Using their imagination, they go sledding, climb a mountain and have a campfire in the attic.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Paddington helps Mateo dress up in 'Paddington and the Three Musketeers', then in 'Paddington and the Dinosaur Hunt', Paddington, Simi and Jonathan are on a dinosaur hunt in the park. (S3, ep 3)

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Things go missing in Windsor Gardens in 'Paddington's Journey into a Black Hole', then in 'Paddington's Rainbow Race!', Simi and Paddington try to find the gold at the end of rainbow. (S3, ep 4)

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Paddington builds a robot in 'Paddington Meets PaddingTron', then in 'Paddington's First Diwali', Baaz invites everyone to celebrate Diwali with him and Paddington is his helpful assistant. (S3, ep 5)

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Paddington has a race against time in 'Paddington and the Solar Eclipse', then in 'Paddington and the Mysterious Inventor', Simi receives an inventor's award, but why does she feel sad? (S3, ep 6)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Art House Day: Granny Sheep and Suzy take Granny Pig and Peppa around Art House Day. After a day full of screen printing and silhouette miniatures, Granny Pig finds the perfect artwork. (S7, ep 19)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Fire Station Practice: Mummy Pig joins with the other mummies to practise fighting fires at the fire station. The fire brigade demonstrate their practice using their motto.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Nanny Plum's Lesson: Nanny Plum is teaching the fairy girls some important fairy rules when she is blown away, trapped in a tree, dropped in a stream and covered in mud!

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The Elf Factory: The Elf Factory is deep down in the roots of The Great Elf Tree. It is almost Christmas time and the elves are busy making toys. Some magic saves the day when there is a problem.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Mrs Witch: Queen Thistle reads Ben and Holly a book about a nasty witch, so Nanny takes the children to meet a real one who lives in the forest. Nanny is rude to the witch, who freezes her with magic.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: King Thistle's New Clothes: Snooty King and Queen Marigold are coming to visit, but when the King's new clothes get dirty Nanny cleans them, along with the King's old clothes - and shrinks them all!

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: The beach is a mess until 'Paddington's Beach Clean Up', then in 'Paddington's Holiday Farewell', the summer holidays have come to an end, so it's time to say goodbye to their new friends. (S3, ep 12)

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Dollhouse Fairytales: Tall tales come to life with a king, a mermaid and so much more as Gabby and the gang create and celebrate enchanting fairytales in a storybook castle. (S2, ep 7)

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You!
programme.desc: Happy Birthday, Sage & Ginger: We're having a party! The whole Spice Family is ready to celebrate, but there's no cake! We play Blue's Clues, and visit Birthday Party World along the way. (S4, ep 19)

programme.title: Circle Square
programme.desc: Treasure Island: Isabella and Vanessa follow an old treasure map around the island. (S1, ep 16)

programme.title: Circle Square
programme.desc: Finders Keepers: Duster finds a teddy bear and claims it. But does it belong to someone else? (S1, ep 17)

programme.title: Circle Square
programme.desc: Camping With Kazam: Gwen wants a real camping experience, but her mum's magic spoils the challenge. (S1, ep 18)

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger is ready for a special day in 'Pups Save Helga and the Humsquatch', then in 'Pups Save the Missing Bone-Stone', the Museum has a brand-new exhibit - which goes missing. (S11, ep 4)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mr. Bull The Teacher: Madame Gazelle leaves the class with Mr Bull while she goes to the dentist. But the children already know the subjects Mr Bull suggests teaching!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Looking for Things: Mummy Pig is baking an apple pie, so Daddy Pig suggests Peppa and George play a game of looking for things.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Poems: Madame Gazelle introduces the playgroup to the wonderful world of poetry - and the wonderful world of wooly socks!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Please and Thank You: Peppa and George learn some wonderful magic words. Nice things happen when you say please and thank you!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Ice Cream: Mr Labrador is here in his new ice cream van. It is his first day selling ice creams. In fact, Mr Labrador loves ice cream - perhaps a little too much!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Science Museum: Peppa and her play group are visiting the museum. But not just any museum - it's the Science Museum, where there are lots of buttons to push and things to try out!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Jukebox: Peppa and George have been sailing with Granny and Grandpa Pig. Back at the clubhouse, they discover a jukebox - but it is very noisy!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Windmills: Peppa and her friends are at playgroup when Mr. Bull arrives to do some noisy work - he is building a windmill, to make electricity! The children join in and make their own windmills too.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Best of Pets: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet. (S1, ep 39)

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Roar: It's the Roar festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. (S1, ep 23)

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Astro Fools: It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. (S1, ep 29)

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The Elf School: Holly and Nanny Plum join Ben at Elf School, where the Wise Old Elf tells them that strictly no magic should be used. Holly finds it difficult until Nanny uses a little magic to help.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The Royal Golf Course: A mole disturbs King Thistle's Golf Course, so a gnome is enlisted to help drive it away. Soon though the gnome is turning the King's golf course into a crazy golf course!

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Morning Noon And Night: The Wise Old Elf teaches the elf children how to tell the time using a watch, while Nanny Plum would much rather use a dandelion clock to teach the fairy children.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Gaston's Visit: Gaston catches a cold when his cave has a leaky roof, so Holly invites him to stay at the Little Castle until it is fixed. But soon Gaston is taking over!

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: A superfood cake creates some super heroes in 'Paddington's Hero Squad', then in 'Paddington's Knightly Quest', Paddington wants to become a Knight; but needs to complete heroic quests! (S3, ep 13)

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Googly Eyes: Gabby receives a jar of googly eyes that comes with a warning: "Don't shake the jar of googly eyes or you'll be in for a troublemaking surprise." (S3, ep 9)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mandy Mouse's Birthday: Today is Mandy Mouse's birthday, and as a special treat, Mandy is going to Cheese World with her friends. It is the most fun ever!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Sandcastle: It is a lovely, sunny day. Peppa and George have come to the seaside. It's a perfect time for everyone to make sandcastles, with a moat, a bridge, and a visitor!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Castle: Mummy and Daddy Pig take Peppa and George to a castle to feast on medieval banquets, play King and Queen and even meet a dragon. It's George's favourite day ever!

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Gerald Giraffe: Gerald Giraffe is new to playgroup! He's trying to make friends with Peppa and the group, but finds being so tall is making playing hide and seek quite a challenge!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit's Taxi: Miss Rabbit takes Peppa and the family to Granny and Grandpa Pig's house to drop off their shopping off, but that's not the last trip of the day for her!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Playing Pretend: When Peppa's bike gets a flat tyre and needs fixing, Peppa and her friends have fun riding their imaginary bikes and jumping in pretend muddy puddles.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Scooters: Daddy Pig takes Peppa and George to school on their scooters. He decides it would be quicker to ride back and he discovers riding scooters is such fun. He shows Mummy Pig how fun it is too.

programme.desc: Moon Cow: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. (S1, ep 16)

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Bogweed: Tim tries to find a bogweed free snack for Kai. (S1, ep 26)

programme.desc: Ben's Birthday Card: Holly forgets Ben's birthday, and rushes home to make him a birthday card. But Nanny has stopped all magic, so Holly has to make the card herself.

programme.desc: Books: Queen Thistle reads the children a story, which inspires a question. They can't find the answer in the magic books in the castle, so go instead to the Wise Old Elf in the Great Elf Library.

programme.desc: Betty Caterpillar: Ben and Holly meet a new friend, Betty Caterpillar, but she is sad that she can't join in their games because she can't fly.

programme.desc: Nursery Rhymes: Madame Gazelle and the playgroup are sharing their best nursery rhymes with each other.

programme.desc: Digger World: Mummy and Daddy Pig, Peppa and George have a wonderful day with Mr. Potato at Digger World!

programme.desc: The Doll Hospital: When Peppa gets Teddy dirty jumping in muddy puddles, she goes to The Doll Hospital.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.desc: Paddington seeks Captain Green Beard's loot in 'Paddington's Pirate Treasure Hunt', then in 'Paddington's Sandcastle Showstopper', everyone is keen to win the sandcastle competition! (S3, ep 10)

programme.desc: Some pufflings get lost in 'Paddington's Puffling Rescue', then in 'Paddington Goes Under The Sea', Paddington enjoys a diving adventure with Jonathan and Judy - but where is her necklace? (S3, ep 11)

programme.desc: Richard Rabbit Comes To Play: Richard Rabbit comes to play with George, while Suzy Sheep comes to play with Peppa. The little boys don't want to play the same games as Peppa and Suzy.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Fun Run: Daddy Pig struggled to run a race to raise money to fix the school roof, but finds it far easier when a wasp is chasing him.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Washing: Daddy Pig hangs his clean football shirt out to dry, but Peppa, George and Mummy splash it with mud. They put it in the wash, but Peppa puts her red dress in, which makes Daddy's shirt pink!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Polly's Boat Trip: Peppa and George go on a boat trip with Grandpa Pig, but they must send for help when their boat runs aground. Polly Parrot fetches Granny Pig and Granddad Dog, who rescues them.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Delphine Donkey: Peppa's French friend Delphine Donkey comes to stay. Peppa takes Delphine to playgroup where they teach her the 'Bing Bong Song'.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Fire Engine: Peppa and George go with Mummy Pig to Miss Rabbit's Mummies Fire Engine Service.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Super Skateboard: It's Grammy's birthday and Crusher wants to get her a super special gift. Blaze and AJ go with him on an adventure doing different jobs to earn the money in time. (S7, ep 3)

programme.title: DORA
programme.desc: Dora gets a birthday surprise in 'Dora's Birthday Surprise', then in 'Moonlight Fiesta', Dora helps La Luna save the Moonlight Fiesta. (S3, ep 5)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Adventure Caravan: Peppa and her family are on a caravan adventure and the first stop is The Biggest Potato in the World. When it starts to get foggy, they park up before another busy day. (S7, ep 25)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Caravan Friends: After Peppa and family visit a tourist spot with her new friend Birgit Bear, the caravan unhooks from the car! Luckily, the bear family stop it just in time. (S7, ep 26)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Chloe's Birthday Party: At Chloe's party, the children and grownups struggle to finish the obstacle course to reach the prize. George is the last to try and finds the birthday cake! (S7, ep 27)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Broken Party Bus: Miss Rabbit arrives with the broken bus. This is a job for Grampy Rabbit! Once fixed, Mummy Rabbit and Rebecca Rabbit arrive with a cake for Grampy Rabbit's birthday! (S7, ep 28)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Living Above the Shops: Peppa is playing with Freddy Fox at his home, in an apartment above the shops. Peggi and Pandora Panda, and Candy Cat live there too, and help show Peppa around. (S7, ep 30)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Roof Top Garden: Peppa and family come to help make a garden on the roof of the apartments. Mr Bull assists with a big truck and crane. There is even a little something for Mrs Duck! (S7, ep 31)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Moving In: Peppa is playing with Candy Cat when Emily Elephant's Granny moves out of the apartment. When the new neighbours arrive, Peppa recognises her holiday friend Rohan Rhino. (S7, ep 32)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Everybody Sleepover!: Peppa and all her friends are having a sleepover - different friends in each of the apartments in the high street. So they play hide and seek across all the rooms! (S7, ep 33)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Walking Bus: The children must walk to school in a walking bus! Miss Rabbit wears a high visibility jacket, leading Peppa and friends in a bus formation. (S7, ep 34)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Happily Ever After: At the playgroup, Madame Gazelle is reading a story, but a page is missing so she makes up an ending. During playtime, the children make up their own endings too! (S7, ep 35)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Singing Lesson: Madame Gazelle is giving the playgroup a singing lesson, helped by Mummy Rhino on the piano. When the parents arrive, the children perform their song. (S7, ep 36)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Singing Competition: Today is the grown-ups' singing competition at the theatre and the kids are the judges. The children jump up and down and sing along. Everybody loves singing! (S7, ep 37)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Larenzo Lion: Today, Mummy Pig and Peppa are at the zoo and meet Larenzo Lion who lives there! Larenzo shows Peppa his toy zoo, but he keeps misplacing his wooden animals in his two bedrooms!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Dinosaurs Alive!: The playgroup is visiting the zoo today. Mr Lion then shows them a giant lizard! The children all believe it's a dinosaur.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Being Babies: Peppa and Rebecca Rabbit pretend to be babies to get Mummy Rabbit's attention. Mummy Rabbit plays along until they admit they are not really babies!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mr Cat's Cafe: Peppa is on a play date with Candy Cat at Mr Cat's Cafe. Candy show Mr Cat the drawings they've done of everyone, and he hangs them up for everyone to see.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Cushion Den: On a cold day, Daddy Pig suggests they build a den until Mummy Pig has finished work. After a hard day's work, the cushion den is a perfect place to watch TV together!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Staying Up Late: Auntie, Uncle Pig and cousin Chloe are coming for dinner and Peppa is allowed to join too! Peppa is very proud of staying up late - she even stayed up later than the Daddies!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: New TV: Peppa and family are watching TV... until it breaks! While Grampy Rabbit fixes it, the family get a new TV which can do everything... but it doesn't beat their old TV.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Indoor Adventure: A storm cancels Peppa and her family's adventure plans so they decide to take it inside. Using their imagination, they go sledding, climb a mountain and have a campfire in the attic.
